game.title: La alcantarilla
game.story_connection: Coco dropped his coins in the sewer and must navigate the dark tunnels to find them

mechanics.core_loop: Navigate through dark sewer maze to collect coins. Use flashlight sparingly - it has limited battery.

controls.swipe_or_drag: Move Coco in that direction through the maze

maze.visibility: Only small area around Coco visible without flashlight
maze.flashlight_radius: Larger visibility cone when flashlight is on

hazards.effect: Pushes Coco in direction of flow

mechanics.goal: Find all 5 coins and reach the exit ladder

states.defeat: Time ran out or got lost

visuals.fog_of_war: Black overlay with circular cutout around Coco
visuals.flashlight: Cone of light in movement direction
visuals.atmosphere: Dripping water effects, occasional gleam of coins

instructions_text: ¡Encuentra tus monedas en la oscuridad! Toca para usar la linterna (¡batería limitada!).
implementation_notes: Generate simple maze using grid (can be predefined for simplicity)
Fog of war: CSS radial gradient mask centered on Coco
Flashlight: larger gradient when active, drains battery
Maze should be solvable, coins placed at dead ends
Simpler alternative: linear path with branching choices
